/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -pthread -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/netune.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/netune.dir/src/app.cpp.o CMakeFiles/netune.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/netune.dir/src/core/event_bus.c.o CMakeFiles/netune.dir/src/core/music_source.c.o CMakeFiles/netune.dir/src/core/music_source_manager.c.o CMakeFiles/netune.dir/src/core/decoder_manager.c.o CMakeFiles/netune.dir/src/infra/thread_pool.c.o CMakeFiles/netune.dir/src/plugins/decoders/dr_mp3/mp3_decoder.c.o CMakeFiles/netune.dir/src/plugins/decoders/ffmpeg/ffmpeg_stream.c.o CMakeFiles/netune.dir/src/plugins/decoders/dr_flac/flac_decoder.c.o CMakeFiles/netune.dir/src/plugins/decoders/dr_flac/wav_decoder.c.o CMakeFiles/netune.dir/src/plugins/audio_outputs/alsa/alsa_plugin.c.o CMakeFiles/netune.dir/src/plugins/audio_outputs/pulseaudio/pulse_plugin.c.o CMakeFiles/netune.dir/src/plugins/audio_outputs/sdl/sdl_plugin.c.o CMakeFiles/netune.dir/src/plugins/music_sources/local/local_source.c.o CMakeFiles/netune.dir/src/plugins/music_sources/netease/netease_source.c.o CMakeFiles/netune.dir/src/plugins/music_sources/netease/netease_api.c.o CMakeFiles/netune.dir/src/ui/state_store.cpp.o CMakeFiles/netune.dir/src/ui/keybindings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/netune.dir/src/ui/theme.cpp.o CMakeFiles/netune.dir/src/ui/layout_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/netune.dir/src/ui/components/theme_util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/netune.dir/src/ui/components/spinner.cpp.o -o netune  _deps/ftxui-build/libftxui-screen.a _deps/ftxui-build/libftxui-dom.a _deps/ftxui-build/libftxui-component.a /usr/lib/libyyjson.so.0.12.0 -ldl -lm _deps/ftxui-build/libftxui-dom.a _deps/ftxui-build/libftxui-screen.a /usr/lib/libyaml.so /usr/lib/libavformat.so /usr/lib/libavcodec.so /usr/lib/libswresample.so /usr/lib/libavutil.so /usr/lib/libasound.so /usr/lib/libpulse-simple.so /usr/lib/libpulse.so /usr/lib/libSDL2.so
